scripts.test: vitest run src/lib/activity.test.ts src/lib/auth.test.ts src/lib/event-impact.test.ts src/lib/financial-analysis.test.ts src/lib/i18n.test.ts src/lib/invitations.test.ts src/lib/site-access.test.ts src/lib/research-store.test.ts src/lib/research-service.test.ts src/lib/sec.test.ts src/lib/sp500.test.ts src/lib/waitlist.test.ts src/lib/valuation.test.ts src/lib/alert-delivery.test.ts src/app/api/activity/client/route.test.ts src/app/api/admin/activity/route.test.ts src/app/api/alerts/route.test.ts src/app/api/alerts/[id]/route.test.ts src/app/api/alerts/deliveries/route.test.ts src/app/api/alerts/deliveries/[id]/route.test.ts src/app/api/admin/alerts/deliver/route.test.ts src/app/api/company/[ticker]/route.test.ts src/app/api/watchlists/[id]/items/route.test.ts src/app/api/valuation/[ticker]/route.test.ts src/app/api/workspace/export/route.test.ts src/middleware.test.ts src/components/finari-app.test.tsx --fileParallelism=false
scripts.security:secrets:current: sh -c 'tmp=$(mktemp -d); git archive HEAD | tar -x -C "$tmp"; gitleaks dir "$tmp" --no-banner --redact --max-target-megabytes 5; code=$?; rm -rf "$tmp"; exit $code'
